title: to부정사 구문 (too~to, enough to, It takes~to)

stages.concept:
# Unit 068: to부정사 구문 (too ~ to, enough to, It takes ~ to) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **to부정사 구문** 세 가지를 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **too + 형용사/부사 + to + 동사원형** — 너무 ~해서 …할 수 없다

> He is **too** tired **to** study.
> 그는 너무 피곤해서 공부할 수 없다.

> The coffee is **too** hot **to** drink.
> 그 커피는 너무 뜨거워서 마실 수 없다.

> She speaks **too** fast **to** understand.
> 그녀는 너무 빨리 말해서 이해할 수 없다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **형용사/부사 + enough + to + 동사원형** — 충분히 ~해서 …할 수 있다

> She is old **enough to** drive a car.
> 그녀는 운전할 수 있을 만큼 충분히 나이가 들었다.

> He is tall **enough to** reach the shelf.
> 그는 선반에 닿을 만큼 충분히 키가 크다.

> The room is big **enough to** hold 50 people.
> 그 방은 50명을 수용할 만큼 충분히 크다.

**Q. 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸을 채울 때 알맞은 말을 고르세요.**
"The room is so big that it can hold 50 people."
= "The room is big (       ) to hold 50 people."
1. too
2. enough ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: **It takes + 시간 + to + 동사원형** — ~하는 데 (시간)이 걸리다

> **It takes** 30 minutes **to** get to school.
> 학교에 가는 데 30분이 걸린다.

> **It took** me two hours **to** finish the homework.
> 숙제를 끝내는 데 두 시간이 걸렸다.

> How long does **it take to** get there?
> 거기에 가는 데 얼마나 걸리나요?

🧑‍🎓 학생: too ~ to(너무 ~해서 못 함), enough to(충분히 ~해서 가능), It takes ~ to(~하는 데 걸리다)! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 068: to부정사 구문 too ~ to, enough to, It takes ~ to - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The boy was (     ) to solve the puzzle.
> **정답** clever enough

---

**02.** She was too tired ? study.
> **정답** to

---

**03.** It takes two hours ? get there.
> **정답** to

---

**04.** He is ? young to drive a car.
> **정답** too

---

**05.** The bag is light ? to carry.
> **정답** enough

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She is enough tall to reach the shelf.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** enough tall → tall enough

---

**07.** He is too short reaching the top.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** reaching → to reach

---

**08.** It takes one hour finishing the homework.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** finishing → to finish

---

**09.** The coffee is enough hot to drink.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** enough hot → hot enough

---

**10.** She is too busy helping me.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** helping → to help

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 너무 피곤해서 공부할 수 없다.
She is tired study.
> **정답** too, to

---

**12.** 그는 운전하기에 충분히 나이가 찼다.
He is to drive.
> **정답** old enough

---

**13.** 거기까지 가는 데 30분이 걸린다.
It 30 minutes get there.
> **정답** takes, to

---

**14.** 이 상자는 너무 무거워서 들 수 없다.
This box is heavy lift.
> **정답** too, to

---

**15.** 그는 이 문제를 풀 만큼 충분히 똑똑하다.
He is to solve this problem.
> **정답** smart enough

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 너무 어려서 혼자 여행할 수 없다.
is too She young to travel alone
> **정답** She / is / too / young / to / travel / alone

---

**17.** 그는 그 차를 살 만큼 충분히 돈이 있다.
He rich enough is to buy the car
> **정답** He / is / rich / enough / to / buy / the / car

---

**18.** 이 책을 읽는 데 3일이 걸린다.
It three takes days to read this book
> **정답** It / takes / three / days / to / read / this / book

---

**19.** 이 수프는 먹기에 너무 뜨겁다.
too This soup is hot to eat
> **정답** This / soup / is / too / hot / to / eat

---

**20.** 그녀는 달리기에 충분히 빠르다.
She fast is enough to run
> **정답** She / is / fast / enough / to / run
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 068: to부정사 구문 too ~ to, enough to, It takes ~ to - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
It is too cold _________________ outside today.
But, my coat is thick enough ___________________
me warm.
playing - to keep
to play - to keep
to play - keeping
playing - keeping
> **정답** to play - to keep

---

**02.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
Her grade was high enough to pass the test.
I am too short to reach the top shelf.
The boy was too scared to stayed alone.
It takes some time getting what you want.
> **정답** The boy was too scared to stayed alone., It takes
some time getting what you want.

---

**03.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
The menu was too expensive to order.
The bus was fast enough to arrived there on
time.
It took some efforts being successful.
The luggage was light enough to carry.
> **정답** The bus was fast enough to arrived there on time., It
took some efforts being successful.

---

**04.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 아이는 너무 빠르게 도망쳐서 잡을 수가 없었다.
The kid ran away so fast to catch.
The kid ran away too fast to catch him.
The kid ran away too fast to catch.
The kid ran away too fast catching.
> **정답** The kid ran away too fast to catch.

---

**05.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀가 아침에 샤워하는 데에 고작 15분이 걸렸다.
It took only 15 minutes for her taking a
shower in the morning.
It took only 15 minutes for her to take a
shower in the morning.
She only took 15 minutes to taking a shower
in the morning.
It took only 15 minutes for her to taking a
shower in the morning.
> **정답** It took only 15 minutes for her to take a shower in
the morning.

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
The new movie was too interesting to miss it.
The book is boring enough to make me sleepy.
The main dishes were delicious enough to
share with others.
Tom is friendly enough to make friends
quickly.
> **정답** The new movie was too interesting to miss it.

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
The clothes are too long and thick to wear in
summer.
She was too upset to answer the phone.
This book is easy enough for children to read.
It will take a while to curing the patient's
illness.
> **정답** It will take a while to curing the patient's illness.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 영작할 때, 세 번째 빈칸에 들어갈 것을
고르시오.
그녀의 능력은 그 기업에 들어가기 충분히 훌륭했다.
Her ability ________ _________ ________ _______
enter the company.
is
to
enough
excellent
> **정답** enough

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 영작할 때, 두 번째 빈칸에 들어갈 것을
고르시오.
그가 자신의 꿈을 실현시키는 데 10년이 걸렸다.
It _______ _______ _______ _______ to make his
dream come true.
him
took
ten
years
> **정답** him

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
They are enough honest to tell the truth.
It took 30 minutes for the ambulance to
transfer the patient.
The English word was enough short to
remember.
This took half an hour her to wait for the bus.
• transfer 옮기다, 이송하다
> **정답** It took 30 minutes for the ambulance to transfer the
patient.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom is enough smart to understand the
situation.
It takes a long time achieving goals.
The chair is enough old to throw away.
My dog is too cute not to love.
> **정답** My dog is too cute not to love.

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분을 어법에 맞게 고치시오.
그 동물은 너무 거칠어서 훈련할 수 없다.
The animal was so wild to train.
→ The animal was .
> **정답** too wild to train

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분을 어법에 맞게 고치시오.
그는 집 벽에 페인트칠을 하는 데 두 시간이 걸렸다.
It took him two hours paint the wall of his house.
→ It took the wall
of his house.
> **정답** him two hours to paint

---

**14.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The fence was enough tall to
protect the house.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** enough tall → tall enough

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
It takes a minute me to
recognize him.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** me → for me

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom is too shy talking to
the girls.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** talking → to talk

---

**17.** 다음 문장과 같은 뜻이 되도록 문장을 완성하시오.
(축약형을 사용할 것)
Her earrings were too small to find in her big
room.
Her earrings were small
find them in her big room.
> **정답** so, that, she, couldn't

---

**18.** 다음 문장과 같은 뜻이 되도록 문장을 완성하시오.
(축약형을 사용할 것)
The food is too spicy for me to try any.
The food is spicy try
any.
> **정답** so, that, I, can't

---

**19.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 배열하시오.
그 호텔은 2주를 머무르기 충분히 편안했다.
The hotel stay was
for two weeks.
enough comfortable
comfortable enough
to
> **정답** The hotel / was / comfortable enough / to / stay / for
two weeks.

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
My little sister is still too young to understand
Korean. Sometimes, this takes me an hour
to explain things to her. But, she is clever
enough learning fast. Soon, her Korean
will be good enough to communicate with me.
> **정답** to understand, it, to explain, to learn, to
communicate
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 068 to부정사 구문 too ~ to, enough to, It takes ~ to중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 단어를 활용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
그 강아지는 훈련사의 명령을 알아들을 정도로 충분히 영
리하다.
힌트 (     ) clever, understand
The dog is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  the
trainer's order.
정답 clever, enough, to, understand

---

**02.** 주어진 단어를 활용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
그들은 집안일을 하기에 너무 바쁘다. [busy, do]
They are  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  the
housework.
정답 too, busy, to, do

---

**03.** 주어진 단어를 활용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
내가 강아지를 씻기는 데 보통 30분이 걸린다. [thirty
minutes, wash]
It usually takes  (     )   (     )   (     )  
 my dog.
정답 me, thirty, minutes, to, wash

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 배열하시오.
그 방은 책을 읽기에 충분히 밝았다.
[read] [The room] [to]
[bright] [books.] [enough]
[was]
정답 The room / was / bright / enough / to / read / books.

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 배열하시오.
그녀는 대화하기에 너무 수다스럽다.
[talkative] [to] [talk] [She]
[with.] [too] [is]
정답 She / is / too / talkative / to / talk / with.

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 배열하시오.
Paul이 영어를 마스터하는 데 3년이 걸렸다.
[English.] [3 years] [master]
[Paul] [took] [It] [to]
정답 It / took / Paul / 3 years / to / master / English.

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
a week, prepare
A: How long does it normally take you to prepare for
the exams?
B: Normally,  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )  for the exams.
정답 it, takes, me, a, week, to, prepare

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
long, enough, speak
A: Can Amy speak English?
B: Yes, she lived in England  (     )   (     )  
 English well.
정답 long, enough, to, speak

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
salty, eat
A: Tom, why don't you eat this dumpling?
B: Well, it is too  (     )   (     )  me  (     )  
the dumpling.
• dumpling 만두
정답 salty, for, to, eat

---

**10.** 주어진 동사를 활용하여 글을 완성하시오.
cook / eat / complete
I am a business woman. I am too busy
 breakfast every morning. I usually
have a cup of coffee for breakfast. It usually takes me
8 hours  (     )  my work. When I return
home, I am too tired  (     )  anything.
정답 to eat, to complete, to cook

---

It took some effort being successful.

그 고양이는 너무 빠르게 도망쳐서 잡을 수가 없었다.

**05.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그가 아침에 준비하는 데에 고작 20분이 걸렸다.

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.

The lesson is boring enough to make me sleepy.

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.

It will take a while to curing the puppy's illness.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 영작할 때, 세 번째 빈칸에 들어갈 것을 고르시오.
그의 실력은 그 팀에 들어가기 충분히 훌륭했다.
His skill ________ _________ ________ _______ join the team. is to enough excellent

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 영작할 때, 두 번째 빈칸에 들어갈 것을 고르시오.
그녀가 자신의 목표를 이루는 데 5년이 걸렸다.

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분을 어법에 맞게 고치시오. 그 강아지는 너무 거칠어서 훈련할 수 없다. The puppy was so wild to train. → The puppy was .
